evidence: "I love mythology any way and this movie was awesome. Full of action and adventure with that hint of romance."
"It was a wonderful addition to our collection and then we watched the third and it was perfect."
"It was a very cute movie, my boys loved every minute of it. Just as good as the first."
"Oh it was a good film if you like this sort of thing. The graphics were amazing and it moved right along with the story and definitely a cliff hanger."
"I really enjoyed this movie now I want to read the book. It was great."
"The graphics were amazing and it moved right along with the story and definitely a cliff hanger."
"I love everyone in this movie. It had a great cast but honestly it was a bit of a let down."
"I love the actors in this film and over all it was okay."
"I loved the actors and singers in this movie it was true to the original story and yet gave it a good dose of modernization."
"The graphics were amazing and it moved right along with the story and definitely a cliff hanger."
"It was fantastic and usually squeals aren't this good. It was just fun and funny."
"My boys are still quoting lines from this movie. It was fantastic and usually squeals aren't this good."
"I really liked this movie I wish they'd make the sequel but from what I've read they won't be...shame"

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented films with elements of adventure and comedy, often appreciating visual spectacle and fast pacing. They show a strong emotional connection to the content, particularly when it resonates with their children, but exhibit low brand loyalty and mixed feelings about production quality.
